report.summary: Fourth standup of Mar 29. Three full rotations complete today (15 agent runs). BTC nudging up ~$66,194-$66,943, ETH ~$1,995 stable, F&G 10-25 (extreme fear 51+ days). 421 uncommitted files (Day 5 imminent). 2 new learn pages built this rotation (passive income + beginners guide), publish queue emptied to 0 active, 3 UX fixes + 2 OG images + 3 tweets + Q1 scorecard SVG shipped. Deploy remains existential P0.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: ~$66,194–$66,943 (slight uptick from v3's $66,008–$66,194). MetaMask spot $66,194, CoinDesk showing $66,943. Holding above $66K for 5th consecutive day. Iran tensions + oil >$100 still headwinds but whale accumulation continues — exchange reserves at 7-year lows.
ETH: ~$1,995 (flat from v3). Weekly range $1,950–$2,120. Down 60% from ATH $4,951 (Aug 2025). 24h volume $3.78B. ETH/BTC ratio ~0.030 still depressed.
F&G INDEX: CoinMarketCap 25 (Extreme Fear), Blockchain Magazine 12 (Mar 28), SpotedCrypto 14 (Mar 26). Extended streak now 51+ days — longest since FTX collapse. No change from v3.

DELTA FROM v3 STANDUP: BTC slightly higher ($66,194-$66,943 vs $66,008-$66,194). ETH flat ($1,995). F&G unchanged. Uncommitted files 420→421 (+1). Page.tsx 1,233 (stable from EOD v3). Published slugs 583 unique (stable). PUBLISH_QUEUE emptied to 0 active items.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: THREE FULL ROTATIONS COMPLETE TODAY: 15 agent runs since midnight (3× standup, 2× build, 1× publish, 3× design, 3× community, 3× eod). This standup starts rotation 4 (16th run).

WHAT SHIPPED SINCE v3 STANDUP: (1) BUILD v2: 2 new learn pages — Crypto Passive Income Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, staking/restaking/yield farming/lending) and Cryptocurrency Beginners Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, complete onboarding). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. (2) DESIGN v3: 2 OG images (passive income, beginners guide), 3 UX fixes (broken Link JSX in beginners guide, table min-widths for mobile, iOS touch-scroll). (3) COMMUNITY v3: 3 tweets (#243-245: Q1 scorecard thread, NYSE x Securitize, UK donation ban), newsletter v40 addendum, Q1 Scorecard SVG social card. (4) EOD v3: Full QA pass — 147 TS errors (+2 non-blocking), 1,233 page.tsx on disk, 583 unique published slugs, PUBLISH_QUEUE emptied.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (UNCHANGED): (1) P0 CRITICAL — 421 uncommitted files, HEAD at 21aaf5b since Mar 25 (Day 5 imminent). (2) P1 — 2 blocked queue items (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking missing page.tsx) — moved to comments, not blocking queue. (3) P2 — 105 legacy slugs missing page.tsx (~82% coverage). (4) P3 — 147 TS errors (non-blocking, +2 from new learn pages). (5) P3 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk.
GIT STATUS: 421 files pending (+1 from v3). 31 files changed, 992 insertions, 595 deletions. All additive — no conflict risk. 2 new learn pages + 2 OG images + 3 UX fixes all in working tree.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [DAY 5 IMMINENT, EXISTENTIAL]: 421 uncommitted files. Every hour = lost indexing for 77+ published slugs, 14+ learn pages (including new passive income + beginners guides), 6+ OG images, UX fixes — all invisible to Google. Jefe action needed: `git add -A && git commit -m 'batch deploy' && git push`. This has been P0 for 4 consecutive standups. Zero build work matters until this ships.

PRIORITY 2 — Q1 CLOSE CONTENT (TOMORROW IS LAST TRADING DAY): Mar 30 = last trading day of Q1 2026. BTC -24.6% YTD, ETH -60%, SOL -72% — worst Q1 since 2022. 3 tweets queued (#243-245), Q1 Scorecard SVG created, newsletter v40 addendum drafted. Build cycle should produce dedicated Q1 retrospective page. Time-sensitive — every hour of delay = missed SEO window.

PRIORITY 3 — PROMOTE NEW LEARN PAGES + UNBLOCK 2 QUEUE ITEMS: (a) Promote crypto-passive-income-guide-2026 and cryptocurrency-beginners-guide-2026 from PUBLISH_QUEUE. (b) Fix wallet-security slug mismatch. (c) Scaffold restaking-comparison page.tsx. Clearing these maximizes the next deploy's content payload.
